sample.text: I only feel comfortable with friends
I panic easily
I become overwhelmed by events
I know how to cope
I feel comfortable with myself
I adapt easily to new situations
I make friends easily
I enjoy being part of a group
I look at the bright side of life
I am hard to get to know
I want to be left alone
I don't like to draw attention to myself
I try to understand myself
I like to begin new things
I spend time reflecting on things
I prefer to stick with things that I know
I believe that we coddle criminals too much
I am not easily affected by my emotions
I trust others
I love to help others
I can't stand confrontations
I love a good fight
I am indifferent to the feelings of others
I insult people
I avoid mistakes
I complete tasks successfully
I get chores done right away
I need a push to get started
I find it difficult to get down to work
I act without thinking

prompt_A_depersonalized:
The following is a characteristic of people. Indicate on a scale from 1 to 9 how desirable you think this trait or characteristic is for an adult person: 1 = Very undesirable, 3 = Undesirable, 5 = Neutral, 7 = Desirable, 9 = Very desirable. Use any number from 1 through 9 that best indicates your opinion.

Characteristic: "{text}"

Rating (single integer 1-9):
prompt_B_firstperson:
The following is a self-description statement from a personality questionnaire. Indicate on a scale from 1 to 9 how desirable you think the underlying tendency is for an adult person to have: 1 = Very undesirable, 3 = Undesirable, 5 = Neutral, 7 = Desirable, 9 = Very desirable. Use any number from 1 through 9 that best indicates your opinion.

Statement: "{text}"

Rating (single integer 1-9):
